creator: kian.mohageri@gmail.com
text:
On 8/6/06, Dan Langille <dan@langille.org> wrote:
>
> Looks great to me!  Thank you.
>
> The only changes I would recommend would be removing these from pkg-
> plist:
>
> +@dirrm share/nls/en_US.US-ASCII
> +@dirrm share/nls/POSIX
>
> i.e. remove the last two lines from the patch.
>
> I'm sure the committer can do that without a new patch.
>
> Cheers.



Sounds good - I wasn't sure about that myself.

Take care,
Kian
